name: quioteframework/mcp
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server capability for Quiote -- expose Quiote actions/tools over MCP.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/mcp/ (docs/MONOREPO_SPLIT_PLAN.md); split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
